name: Repair senolytics exact-effect extraction follow-up coverage state
summary: Updates the senolytics coverage assessment to recognize durable PubMed EFetch snapshots for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk abstract-level extraction, and reconciles the legacy IPF generic feasibility/tolerability finding, outcome, and result to the abstract-reported N=12 randomized pilot. The candidate leaves D+Q bone full publication-table and supplement reconciliation, plus full-text DKD/IPF/AD-risk extraction beyond abstracts, as explicit remaining debt.

scope.question: Refresh the senolytics exact-effect extraction coverage gap after durable PubMed abstract snapshots became available, reconcile the legacy IPF generic outcome/result, and keep D+Q bone publication-table and supplement debt visible.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded extraction-refresh repair candidate and its changed canonical-record ledger.
Refreshes the coverage gap text and provenance to reflect source-snapshot-backed abstract extraction and the remaining full-text/table debt.
Reconciles the legacy generic IPF finding from triage-level wording to PubMed abstract-located N=12 feasibility and tolerability details.
Reconciles the legacy generic IPF outcome to the abstract-located feasibility, tolerability, dose-completion, and assessment-completion endpoint context.
Corrects the legacy IPF generic result sample size to N=12 and adds abstract-located D+Q versus placebo safety and feasibility details.

promotion.summary: Promoted to accepted after all required active review lanes passed.
